ecs.taskdefinition.runtimeplatform.CfnAb:
Information about the platform for the Amazon ECS service or task.

For more informataion about `RuntimePlatform`, see [RuntimePlatform](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AmazonECS/latest/developerguide/task_definition_parameters.html

ecs.taskdefinition.runtimeplatform.CpuAr.Description: The CPU architecture.  You can run your Linux tasks on an ARM-based platform by setting the value to `ARM64`. This option is avaiable for tasks that run on Linuc Amazon EC2 instance or Linux containers on Fargate.

ecs.taskdefinition.runtimeplatform.Opera.Allowed values: LINUX | WINDOWS_SERVER_2004_CORE | WINDOWS_SERVER_2016_FULL | WINDOWS_SERVER_2019_CORE | WINDOWS_SERVER_2019_FULL | WINDOWS_SERVER_2022_CORE | WINDOWS_SERVER_2022_FULL | WINDOWS_SERVER_20H2_CORE
